nasb.text: These will go away into eternal punishment, but the righteous into eternal life.”

esv.text: And these will go away into eternal punishment, but the righteous into eternal life.”

cnv.text: 他們要進入永遠的刑罰，義人卻要進入永生。”

ccb.text: 这些人要受永远的刑罚，但义人要得到永远的生命。”

csbs.text: “结果这些人将离去，进入永远的刑罚。然而，义人将进入永恒的生命。”
